subcodes.first_line: O Ali! Through divine grace thou hast attained, and from the ocean of divine knowledge thou hast quaffed. We beseech the True One in all conditions [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا علی بعنایت الهی فائز شدی و از بحر عرفان نوشیدی از حق میطلبیم در جمیع احوال
subcodes.subjects: @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @firmness in the Covenant, @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @exhortations and counsels, @spiritual transformation
